page_metadata.biotools__summary: Recognition Code-Assisted Discovery of regulatory Elements combines predictions from a DNA recognition code of C2H2-ZFs with ChIP-seq data to identify models that represent the genuine DNA binding prefer-ences of C2H2-ZF proteins.
